nasb.text: and were crying out as they saw the smoke of her burning, saying, ‘What city is like the great city?’

esv.text: and cried out as they saw the smoke of her burning, “What city was like the great city?”

cnv.text: 他們看見了焚燒她的煙，就喊叫說：‘有哪一座城能與這大城相比呢？’

ccb.text: 看见烧她的烟，就说，‘有哪一座城能与她相比呢？’

csbs.text: 他们看着焚烧她时的烟，呼喊说：“哪一个城能与这大城相比呢？”
